2026-06-12.original_title: The AI industry's platform trap is starting to look a lot like Microsoft's
2026-06-12.original_content: Anthropic is throttling its new Mythos model for certain tasks while building apps that directly compete with its largest customers. Customers, partners, and investors are pushing back. The article The AI industry's platform trap is starting to look a lot like Microsoft's appeared first on The Decoder .
2026-06-12.chinese_title: Anthropic也陷入平台自营应用争议
2026-06-12.summary: Anthropic一边限制部分客户使用新模型能力，一边推出与大客户直接竞争的应用，引发客户、合作伙伴和投资人对平台中立性的担忧。
2026-06-12.extension: 这类冲突会放大AI平台方既当基础设施又当应用公司的矛盾，后续可追踪企业客户是否转向多模型供应商，以及监管和投资人如何重新评估平台风险。

2026-06-12.original_title: Rocket Report: Nova moving through test campaign; SpaceX IPO launches Friday
2026-06-12.original_content: Welcome to Edition 8.45 of the Rocket Report! Even though we are now two weeks removed from the catastrophic loss of the New Glenn rocket and its LC-36A launch pad, it continues to dominate discussion in the space community. This week, NASA said it nominally plans to fly Blue Origin's test lander on New Glenn for the Artemis III mission, but officials quietly acknowledged that other launch vehicles, including Vulcan and the Falcon Heavy, could also get the job done. We'll obviously be watching closely. As always, we welcome reader submissions , and if you don't want to miss an issue, please subscribe using the box below (the form will not appear on AMP-enabled versions of the site). Each report will include information on small-, medium-, and heavy-lift rockets as well as a quick look ahead at the next three launches on the calendar. Isar raises funding, announces new launch date . German launch startup Isar Aerospace announced this week that it had closed a 270 million euro Series D to "drive global scaling and ramp up serial production," European Spaceflight reports . The company also said the previously delayed second launch attempt of its Spectrum rocket would now take place sometime between June 15 and June 21. Read full article Comments
2026-06-12.chinese_title: SpaceX IPO前夕火箭市场变数增多
2026-06-12.summary: Ars Technica火箭周报称，Blue Origin新火箭事故后NASA仍计划让New Glenn承担Artemis III测试任务，但也承认Vulcan和Falcon Heavy可能成为备选。
2026-06-12.extension: 商业航天上市和NASA任务分配会相互影响，后续可延伸观察Blue Origin恢复进度、ULA和SpaceX的替代机会，以及资本市场对航天基础设施的定价。

2026-06-12.original_title: Kimi 2.7 code is released & open-sourced, latest coding model by Kimi
2026-06-12.original_content: Improved coding & agent performance over K2.6: +21.8% on Kimi Code Bench v2, +11.0% on Program Bench, and +31.5% on MLS Bench Lite. Reasoning efficiency: Less overthinking, with 30% lower reasoning-token usage compared to K2.6. Long-horizon coding: Improved instruction following, higher end-to-end coding task success rates. 6x High-Speed Mode coming soon & Available today via Kimi API and Kimi Code Weights & Code in Hugging Face Source: Kimi AI submitted by /u/BuildwithVignesh [link] [comments]
2026-06-12.chinese_title: Kimi开源新版代码模型强化Agent能力
2026-06-12.summary: Kimi 2.7 Code发布并开源，官方称在多项代码与Agent基准上较前代提升，同时减少推理token消耗，并计划推出6倍高速模式。
2026-06-12.extension: 开源代码模型继续压低开发者工具门槛，后续可比较Kimi与DeepSeek、Qwen、Codex系模型在长程任务和成本效率上的真实表现。

2026-06-12.original_title: OpenAI buys Ona to push Codex toward long-running, autonomous coding tasks
2026-06-12.original_content: OpenAI is acquiring Ona, previously known as Gitpod, a startup founded in Kiel, Germany in 2020 that specializes in AI agents and secure cloud development environments for software development. The article OpenAI buys Ona to push Codex toward long-running, autonomous coding tasks appeared first on The Decoder .
2026-06-12.summary: OpenAI将收购原Gitpod团队Ona，借助其AI Agent和安全云开发环境能力，推动Codex向更长时间、自主化的软件开发任务演进。
2026-06-12.extension: 这笔收购显示代码Agent竞争正从模型能力扩展到开发环境和任务执行基础设施，后续可关注GitHub、Cursor、JetBrains等生态反应。
